data.title: 24th Annual Life Time Miami Marathon & Half attracted 17,000 runners, energizing South Florida.
data.description: Miami's 'Magic City' was abuzz as it hosted the 24th Annual Life Time Miami Marathon and Half event presented by FP Movement on January 25, 2026. The event attracted over 17,000 participants from around the world, turning South Florida into a lively hub of running enthusiasts.

data.title: Faraday Future's first EAI Robotics product completed US certification and is ready for sales. CEO shared weekly update.
data.description: In a recent update shared by YT Jia, Founder and Global Co-CEO of Faraday Future Intelligent Electric Inc. (NASDAQ: FFAI), the California-based company specializing in intelligent electric mobility reported its weekly business progress. Faraday Future, also known as FF, operates as a global shared ecosystem company in the electric vehicle industry. The update, released on January 25, 2026, provided insights into the company's ongoing operations and strategic developments. This communication is part of Faraday Future's efforts to maintain transparency and keep stakeholders informed about its activities.

data.title: Jennifer L. Mnookin appointed as next president of Columbia University starting on July 1, 2026.
data.description: On January 25, 2026, it was announced that Jennifer L. Mnookin, a distinguished legal scholar currently serving as Chancellor of the University of Wisconsin-Madison, has been chosen by Columbia University's Board of Trustees as the next president of the institution. Mnookin is set to assume the presidency on July 1.
